full_text:
| | | 09:20 (1 hour ago)
 | 
 |

Hi Anastasiya,
Our protocol is as follows:
2 x Alcohol Absolute wash, 5-10 min RT (before putting the samples into the machine).
Then, the machine protocols are attached as pictures.
So always 1 Alcohol Absolute step, 1 Isopropanol step and 1 wax step (paraffin). The times are depending on the thickness of the tissues. 
So 5mm program for 5mm and up and 3 mm program for thinner tissues. We also have program for 1 and 2 mm.
And we can also make a program for your needs, as long as it is Alcohol Abs-Isopropanol-Wax.
Let us know when you will bring samples.
Best regards,
Anna
